name: appversion
description: Analyze commits, recommend and apply a SemVer bump to appversion.json + package.json, update the changelog, and cut a tagged GitHub Release. Optional read-only enrichment from Jira, Plane, Shortcut, ClickUp, Linear.

interface.shortDescription: SemVer bump, changelog, tag, and GitHub Release for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Guided release flow: analyze commits since the last version, recommend an itemized SemVer bump, apply it to appversion.json + package.json, update the changelog, and cut a tagged GitHub Release behind explicit confirmation gates. Optional read-only enrichment from Jira, Plane, Shortcut, ClickUp, and Linear.
defaultPrompt: Cut a release for this project.
Bump the version and update the changelog.
